articles.title: Iran not planning to send enriched uranium to the US — Deputy Foreign Minister
articles.description: Saeed Khatibzadeh stated that this issue is not discussed

articles.title: Iran ‘victorious’ in war with US, speaker says
articles.description: TEHRAN — Iran had been “victorious in the field” during weeks of war and had only agreed to a temporary truce with the United States because its demands had been met, the Iranian parliamentary speaker said on Saturday. The two-week ceasefire is set to end Wednesday unless it is renewed, with a permanent deal that

articles.title: Homicide investigation launched after three people killed in Hastings
articles.description: One person died at the scene and two others died shortly after in hospital.

articles.title: Panic as North Korea launches enormous missile as fears of all-out war explode
articles.description: South Korea's Joint Chiefs of Staff said the launches happened on Sunday morning from the North's eastern Sinpo area.

articles.title: North Korea fired several missiles — Japan’s Defense Minister
articles.description: Shinjiro Koizumi said that the impact point is outside the exclusive economic zone of Japan

articles.title: Iran's Supreme Leader sends disturbing warning to US as world enters new panic mode
articles.description: Iran's Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei issued a chilling warning to the US, threatening "new defeats" while mocking American and Israeli "weakness and humiliation"

articles.title: Hezbollah is willing to cooperate with a cease-fire with Israel. For now.
articles.description: The leader of the Iran-backed militia said that a more durable peace with Israel would require the fulfillment of a list of long-standing demands.

articles.title: Chris Bishop says Christopher Luxon is the person to ‘lead us into the election’, denies leadership ambitions
articles.description: The National MP's comments come amid reports of party discontent.

articles.title: Iranian officials 'too afraid' to hold funeral for assassinated Ali Khamenei
articles.description: Ali Khamenei, 86, was assassinated in a joint US-Israeli airstrike on February 28 that launched the Iran war, but his remains are yet to be buried weeks later

articles.title: EU calls to observe international law are pinnacle of hypocrisy — Iranian Foreign Ministry
articles.description: Esmail Baghaei stressed that not a single principle of international law prohibits necessary measures to be taken by Iran as the coastal state to prevent the use of the Hormuz Strait for military aggression against the country
